title: deploy.config.yml
description: Per-repo configuration for the iamthearm/ci-templates reusable deploy pipeline. This file documents the schema for editor tooling (e.g. yaml-language-server); validate-config.mjs performs the authoritative validation with human-readable errors at CI time.

version.description: Config schema version. Lets ci-templates evolve without breaking old configs.

app_name.description: Used as the image name, the VPS directory name, and the default Caddy path prefix.

dockerfile.description: Path to the Dockerfile, relative to repo root.

enabled.description: No implicit default — must be an explicit choice so a repo can't silently end up with zero test coverage.

image.description: If set, command runs inside `docker run --rm <image> sh -c "<command>"` with the repo mounted, instead of running directly on the runner.

unity.description: Optional. Entirely irrelevant for non-Unity repos.

enabled.description: Must be explicitly true to run the Unity batch-mode test stage. Off by default — GitHub-hosted runners have no Unity Editor and Unity requires a CI license.

version.description: Required when enabled is true, e.g. '2022.3.10f1'.

license_secret_name.description: NAME of a GitHub secret holding the Unity license (ULF), not the value. Required when enabled is true.

enabled.description: false = test-only, nothing touches the VPS (e.g. a repo with no long-running HTTP service).

port.description: Container's internal listening port. Required when enabled is true. Never published directly to the host.

path_prefix.description: Caddy path prefix, must be unique VPS-wide. Defaults to '/<app_name>'.

path.description: Checked as <path_prefix><path> through Caddy. Required when deploy.enabled is true.

env.description: Names only, never values. Actual values live in the VPS's per-app .env file, created once at onboarding.
